title: 21 CFR Part 11 Electronic Records
description: Comply with 21 CFR Part 11 for electronic records and signatures in FDA-regulated systems.

title: Computer-Generated Audit Trail
description: Use secure computer-generated time-stamped audit trails per 21 CFR 11.10(e).

title: Computerized System Validation
description: Validate computerized systems per 21 CFR 11.10(a) using GAMP 5 framework.

title: FDA Drug cGMP
description: Apply Current Good Manufacturing Practice for drugs per 21 CFR 211.

title: FDA Biologics cGMP
description: Apply biologics cGMP per 21 CFR 600 series.

title: QSR for Medical Device Pharma
description: Apply 21 CFR Part 820 Quality System Regulation for medical devices.

title: FDA Good Laboratory Practice
description: Apply Good Laboratory Practice for nonclinical laboratory studies.

title: IND Application
description: Submit Investigational New Drug application per 21 CFR Part 312.

title: New Drug Application
description: Submit NDA per 21 CFR Part 314 for drug approval.

title: Informed Consent
description: Obtain informed consent from research subjects per 21 CFR Part 50.

title: Institutional Review Board
description: Submit research to IRB per 21 CFR Part 56.

title: ICH E6 R3 GCP Compliance
description: Apply ICH E6(R3) Good Clinical Practice in clinical trials.

title: ICH Q7 API Manufacturing
description: Apply ICH Q7 GMP for active pharmaceutical ingredients.

title: ICH Q9 Quality Risk Management
description: Apply ICH Q9 quality risk management framework.

title: ICH Q10 Pharmaceutical Quality System
description: Establish PQS per ICH Q10.

title: ICH Q12 Lifecycle Management
description: Apply ICH Q12 product lifecycle management framework.

title: ICH E2A Pharmacovigilance Definitions
description: Apply ICH E2A definitions for pharmacovigilance reporting.

title: ICH E2D Post-Approval Safety
description: Apply ICH E2D for post-approval safety data management.

title: ICH E2E Pharmacovigilance Planning
description: Apply ICH E2E pharmacovigilance planning.

title: ICH E3 Clinical Study Reports
description: Format clinical study reports per ICH E3.

title: ICH E8 General Considerations
description: Apply ICH E8(R1) general considerations for clinical studies.

title: ICH E9 Statistical Principles
description: Apply ICH E9(R1) statistical principles for clinical trials.

title: ICH M4 Common Technical Document
description: Submit regulatory dossiers in CTD format per ICH M4.

title: ICH M11 CeSHarP Template
description: Apply ICH M11 standardized protocol template (CeSHarP).

title: EMA Marketing Authorization
description: Obtain EMA centralized marketing authorization per Regulation 726/2004.

title: EU Pharmacovigilance Module
description: Comply with EU GVP modules I through XVI.

title: ISO IDMP Standards
description: Apply ISO IDMP standards for medicinal product identification.

title: EU Medical Device Regulation
description: Comply with EU MDR (EU) 2017/745 for medical devices.

title: EU IVD Regulation
description: Comply with EU IVDR (EU) 2017/746 for in-vitro diagnostics.

title: EU Clinical Trials Regulation
description: Submit clinical trials via EU CTIS per Regulation 536/2014.

title: Falsified Medicines Directive
description: Comply with FMD with unique identifier and tamper-evident packaging.

title: USP-NF Compliance
description: Comply with United States Pharmacopeia and National Formulary monographs.

title: European Pharmacopoeia Compliance
description: Comply with European Pharmacopoeia monographs.

title: Japanese Pharmacopoeia Compliance
description: Comply with Japanese Pharmacopoeia 18th edition for Japanese market.

title: GAMP 5 Risk-Based Validation
description: Apply GAMP 5 risk-based approach to computerized system validation.

title: ALCOA+ Data Integrity
description: Maintain ALCOA+ data integrity (Attributable, Legible, Contemporaneous, Original, Accurate).

title: EU Good Distribution Practice
description: Apply EU GDP for medicinal product distribution.

title: GxP Cloud Computing Guidance
description: Apply GxP cloud computing guidance per ISPE GAMP and PIC/S Annex 11.

title: DSCSA Track and Trace
description: Implement DSCSA track-and-trace serialization for prescription drugs.

title: DEA Controlled Substance Registration
description: Maintain DEA registration for handling controlled substances.

title: Suspicious Order Monitoring
description: Implement suspicious order monitoring for controlled substances.

title: FDA AERS Reporting
description: Report adverse events to FDA via FAERS within required timeframes.

title: EudraVigilance Reporting
description: Submit ICSRs to EudraVigilance per EU GVP Module VI.

title: WHO VigiBase Submissions
description: Submit international ADR reports to WHO VigiBase via E2B(R3).

title: PDMA Drug Sample Compliance
description: Comply with PDMA drug sample distribution requirements per 21 CFR Part 203.

title: 510(k) Premarket Notification
description: Submit 510(k) for Class II medical device pharma equipment.

title: HIPAA for Pharma Patient Data
description: Apply HIPAA Privacy Rule when handling PHI in pharma operations.

title: PhRMA Code on Interactions
description: Apply PhRMA Code on Interactions with HCPs for ethical marketing.

title: Open Payments / Physician Sunshine Act
description: Report payments to physicians per Open Payments program.

title: EFPIA Disclosure Code
description: Disclose payments to HCPs/HCOs per EFPIA Disclosure Code.

title: Anti-Kickback Statute
description: Avoid AKS violations in pharmaceutical marketing and reimbursement.

title: False Claims Act Compliance
description: Avoid false claims to federal healthcare programs per FCA.

title: Direct-to-Consumer Advertising
description: Comply with FDA DTC prescription drug advertising rules.

title: OPDP Promotional Review
description: Submit promotional materials to OPDP per Form FDA 2253.

title: Off-Label Use Restrictions
description: Restrict promotional content to FDA-approved indications.

title: Drug Shortage Notifications
description: Notify FDA of drug shortages per 21 USC 356c.

title: REMS Risk Evaluation and Mitigation
description: Implement REMS for drugs with safety signals requiring risk mitigation.

title: Lawful Basis for Patient Data
description: Document lawful basis for patient personal data in pharma operations.

title: Health Data Article 9
description: Apply GDPR Article 9 for health data processing in pharma.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Pharma Data Transfers
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for pharma data transfers outside EEA.

title: Research Exception
description: Apply GDPR Article 89 safeguards for pharma research data.

title: EU GMP Annex 11
description: Apply EU GMP Annex 11 for computerised systems in pharma.

title: PIC/S GMP Cooperation
description: Apply PIC/S GMP guide for international pharma inspections.

title: FDA Combination Product Rules
description: Apply 21 CFR Part 4 for combination products.

title: ICH Q3 Impurities Guidelines
description: Apply ICH Q3 series for impurities in drug substances and products.

title: ICH Q1 Stability Testing
description: Apply ICH Q1A(R2) stability testing of drug substances and products.

title: ICH Q2 Analytical Validation
description: Validate analytical methods per ICH Q2(R2).

title: ICH Q14 Analytical Procedure Development
description: Apply ICH Q14 analytical procedure development.

title: WHO Prequalification Programme
description: Maintain WHO prequalification for medicines supplied to UN agencies.

title: FDA CBER Biologics Compliance
description: Comply with FDA CBER requirements for biological products.

title: FDA CDER Drug Evaluation
description: Comply with FDA CDER drug evaluation and research requirements.

title: FDA CDRH Device Compliance
description: Comply with FDA CDRH for medical devices and radiological products.

title: FDA Form 1572 Investigator Statement
description: Use FDA Form 1572 for clinical investigator commitment.

title: ClinicalTrials.gov Registration
description: Register clinical trials on ClinicalTrials.gov per FDAAA Section 801.

title: Revised Common Rule
description: Comply with revised Common Rule for federally-funded human subjects research.

title: OFAC Customer Screening
description: Screen pharma customers and partners against OFAC SDN list.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery
description: Avoid corrupt payments to foreign officials in international pharma operations.

title: UK Bribery Act Compliance
description: Maintain adequate procedures to prevent bribery per Section 7.

title: EU Member State Transparency
description: Comply with EU Member State HCP payment transparency laws.

title: Drug Quality and Security Act
description: Comply with DQSA Title I (compounding) and Title II (DSCSA).

title: FDA Compounding Regulations
description: Comply with FDA compounding regulations for 503A/503B facilities.

title: EU GMP Annex 15
description: Apply EU GMP Annex 15 qualification and validation principles.

title: EU GMP Annex 1
description: Apply EU GMP Annex 1 for sterile medicinal product manufacturing.

title: FDA Cell and Gene Therapy
description: Apply FDA cell and gene therapy guidance documents.

title: EU Advanced Therapy Medicinal Products
description: Comply with EU ATMP Regulation for cell, gene, and tissue therapies.

title: ISO 13485 QMS for Medical Devices
description: Establish QMS per ISO 13485 for medical device pharma manufacturing.

title: ISO 9001 QMS
description: Establish QMS per ISO 9001 for pharma operations.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: Pharma ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for pharma R&D / manufacturing / clinical systems.

title: Patient/Trial Data Encryption
description: Apply ISO 27001 encryption to patient and clinical trial data.

title: EU AI Act for Pharma AI
description: Apply EU AI Act high-risk classification to drug discovery and trial AI systems.

title: Pharma Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS per ISO 22301 for pharma operations continuity.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK pharma operations.

title: Pharma Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering trial data and IP breach response.

title: TCFD Climate Disclosure
description: Disclose climate-related risks per TCFD framework.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive.

title: REACH for Pharma Excipients
description: Comply with REACH for excipient and intermediate chemicals in EU operations.

title: Biosimilar Approval Pathway
description: Apply FDA biosimilar approval pathway per BPCIA Section 351(k).

title: EMA Biosimilar Guidelines
description: Apply EMA biosimilar guidelines for EU biosimilar applications.
